variants: Sushmita Mukherji is well-regarded in the academic community as a scholar in Comparative literature. In recognition of her outstanding contributions, she received the Keystone Thread Token. Sushmita is an active member of the Verdant Drift Crafters, a society focused on collaborative artistic endeavors. Her journey in academia was significantly shaped by her mentor and doctoral advisor, Vikram Devalla, who guided her research and critical analysis.
